---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(broom)

data_paa <- readRDS("data_paa.rds")
```

```{r}
paa_param <- c("augmentation",
               "architecture", 
               "epochs", 
               "learning_rate", 
               "Classification.level",
               "num_class", 
               "num_img", 
               "curation", 
               "PAA",
               "id")
paa_param_num <- c("epochs", 
                   "learning_rate", 
                   "num_class", 
                   "num_img", 
                   "PAA")

data_paa_param <- data_paa %>% 
  mutate(architecture = as.factor(architecture),
         curation = as.factor(curation)) %>% 
  filter(if_all(all_of(paa_param), 
                ~ !is.na(.))) %>% 
  select(-author, 
         -journal, 
         -year, 
         -citations)

model1 <- lmer(PAA ~ scale(num_img) + scale(num_class) + scale(epochs) + scale(learning_rate) + curation + augmentation + (1 | id), 
               data = data_paa_param)
summary(model1)

options(na.action = "na.fail")

model1_dredge <- dredge(model1)
model1_avg <- model.avg(model1_dredge, subset = delta < 6)
summary(model_avg)

model2 <- lmer(PAA ~ scale(num_img) * augmentation + scale(num_class) + scale(epochs) + scale(learning_rate) + curation + augmentation + (1 | id),
               data = data_paa_param)
summary(model2)

model2_dredge <- dredge(model2)
model2_avg <- model.avg(model2_dredge, subset = delta < 6)
summary(model2_avg)

AICc(model1, model2)
```

```{r}
plot_data <- data_paa_param %>%
  mutate(
    fitted = fitted(model1),
    resid  = resid(model1)
  )

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = PAA)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(
    x = "Fitted PAA",
    y = "Observed PAA",
    title = "Observed vs Fitted Values"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = resid)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Fitted PAA",
    y = "Residuals",
    title = "Residuals vs Fitted Values"
  ) +
  theme_classic()


tidy(model1, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = estimate, y = reorder(term, estimate))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high), height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Estimated effect on PAA",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Effects of Training and Dataset Parameters on PAA"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```
